text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 35 

MDCD_LTSS_LEVEL_MOS 

LABEL: Medicaid — LTSS Provider 1 Level of Care Code Months 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the number of months during the year where the beneficiary’s Medicaid monthly Long-
Term Services and Supports (LTSS) Level of Care Code indicated that some level of support was 
required to meet a beneficiary's needs. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS DE file (derived) 

VALUES: 0–12, or null/missing
